function.name: structure_editor

args.file_text:
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth/next"; import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth"; import Link from "next/link"; import LogoutButton from "./LogoutButton"; export default async function Navbar() { const session = await getServerSession(authOptions); return (
RestoManager
Home {session && ( <> Restaurants Orders )}
{session ? (
Hi, {session.user?.name || session.user?.email}
) : (
Sign In Sign Up
)}
); }
